ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host managing the property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Group the property belongs to (e.g., borough) */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighbourhood of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for renting the property */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the property */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review received */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews received per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Count of listings by the host */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Availability of the property in days per year */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the property */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Additional cleaning fee for the property */,
  "service_fee" REAL /* Additional service fee for the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the property listing was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the host */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received across all listings */,
  "host_email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "host_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "host_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the host */,
  "host_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the host's profile picture */,
  "host_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the host */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date the host joined the platform */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Average response time of the host to inquiries */,
  "host_response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the host to inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Score given in the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_usefulness" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as useful */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Whether the review is marked as helpful by the platform */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price charged for the stay */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  "guests_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
